necessityProof.blockerResolved: The audit store env config profile and audit store runtime profile still duplicated the same Markdown title/meta/section/list report frame, even though their entries, evidence endpoints, and next actions match the shared builder contract.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can now classify the foundational audit-store profile pair as builder-backed before scanning the remaining access-control and compact-plan report shapes.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared verification report builder already owns entries and list sections. Message rows remain local because these two legacy profiles intentionally do not expose a source field, and store rows remain local because they render h3 store cards inside the Stores section.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new builder option was added. Compact-spacing renderers and source-less message reports should continue using lines sections unless several remaining files prove the same shape deserves a tested helper.

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest loaded each legacy renderer through git show HEAD:<path>, transpiled it in-memory with TypeScript, and compared memory/file/database config plus default/file runtime profile output against the migrated renderer.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2108-renderer-consolidation-batch-20-v2137.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2137 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation. It does not change evidence schemas, route contracts, fresh sibling evidence requirements, or live integration startup behavior.
